Royal Pop as pocket-watch-to-wrist conversion phenomenon

why_these_will_work: The selected reel uses a problem‑driven hook that matches the highest‑scoring TikTok‑centric trend, while the visual focus on exact specs satisfies the IG‑driven engineering‑obsession cluster. Together they address both urgency (competitor flood) and scarcity (waitlist) in a concise 30‑second format that has proven high engagement in past winners.
